behaviorsAudited: resolves file paths safely relative to the AgenC cwd before any provider opens a file
rejects binary files and files over the configured size limit before embedded Neovim launches when possible
preserves encoding and line ending metadata across read and write paths
detects disk conflicts and in-flight agent edit conflicts deterministically before saving
keeps active file and cursor state synchronized after provider cursor movement and file writes

edgeCasesAudited: a path escaping the workspace through parent segments is rejected before provider open
a file containing a NUL byte is rejected with a user-facing binary file message
a file over the maximum size returns a size-specific error before Neovim spawn
a workspace symlink resolving outside the workspace is rejected before file reads
a disk mtime change after open blocks non-force save with conflict status
a CRLF file saved without text changes keeps CRLF line endings

commandEvidence: PASS: 1 test file passed, 22 tests passed, duration 5.10s
sourceEvidence: TODO.md:118-134 requires the Neovim provider to integrate with AgenC file safety, open files relative to AgenC cwd, preserve binary/max-file rejection before embedded mode when possible, update active file/cursor state, and handle disk and agent conflicts deterministically.
TODO.md:157-160 scopes the file-safety row to path resolution, binary files, max-size files, disk conflicts, in-flight agent edits, and line-ending preservation where applicable.
behaviorEvidence: Path safety is implemented by resolveBufferFilePath using getCwd, realpath base resolution, absolute/relative resolution, and inside-base checks at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/fileSnapshot.ts:55-64 and runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/fileSnapshot.ts:83-88. Inline open rejects unsafe paths before loading at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/BufferStore.ts:777-793, and embedded open reads a safe snapshot before startSession at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/providers/neovim/NeovimBufferProvider.ts:90-145. Tests assert parent-segment escape, absolute outside paths, symlink escape, and provider pre-open rejection at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:41-77 and runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:226-248.

Binary and size rejection are implemented by stat size checks and NUL-byte detection at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/fileSnapshot.ts:142-152. Embedded Neovim reads the file snapshot before startSession at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/providers/neovim/NeovimBufferProvider.ts:97-110 and reports read errors without spawning at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/providers/neovim/NeovimBufferProvider.ts:141-145. Tests assert binary and max-size user-facing errors at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:79-89, no embedded start for binary files at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:200-224, and no embedded start for oversized files at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:250-267.

Encoding and line-ending metadata are detected and encoded in runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/fileSnapshot.ts:90-127, returned in read snapshots at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/fileSnapshot.ts:150-162, preserved through the shared write helper at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/fileSnapshot.ts:195-197, and refreshed in embedded provider metadata at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/providers/neovim/NeovimBufferProvider.ts:338-348. Tests assert CRLF preservation at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:99-112, UTF-16LE BOM preservation at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:114-127, and embedded metadata refresh after save at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:371-406.

Disk conflict detection is implemented in saveBufferFileSnapshot with mtime and content checks at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/fileSnapshot.ts:177-193 and in embedded provider pre-save checks at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/providers/neovim/NeovimBufferProvider.ts:148-172 and runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/providers/neovim/NeovimBufferProvider.ts:327-336. In-flight agent conflicts are rejected before saving by inline store at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/BufferStore.ts:212-250, embedded provider at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/providers/neovim/NeovimBufferProvider.ts:148-156, and BufferSurface save plumbing at runtime/src/tui/workbench/surfaces/BufferSurface.tsx:42-49, runtime/src/tui/workbench/surfaces/BufferSurface.tsx:260-263, and runtime/src/tui/workbench/surfaces/BufferSurface.tsx:301-304. Tests assert mtime conflicts, same-mtime content conflicts, inline agent conflicts, embedded agent conflicts, and embedded disk conflict pre-save without session.save at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:129-198 and runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:269-332.

Active file, cursor, and metadata synchronization is implemented by embedded onSnapshot updates at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/providers/neovim/NeovimBufferProvider.ts:115-119, cursor conversion into provider snapshots at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/providers/neovim/NeovimBufferProvider.ts:351-376, metadata refresh at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/providers/neovim/NeovimBufferProvider.ts:338-348, controller snapshot propagation at runtime/src/tui/workbench/buffer/providers/BufferProviderController.ts:183-186, and BufferSurface rendering from synchronized snapshot fields at runtime/src/tui/workbench/surfaces/BufferSurface.tsx:140-148. Tests assert cursor/file metadata after provider movement at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:334-369 and refreshed encoding/lineEndings after successful save at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:371-406.
edgeCaseEvidence: Parent-segment workspace escape rejection is asserted at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:41-47 and provider pre-open rejection is asserted at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:226-248.

NUL-byte binary rejection and user-facing binary messaging are asserted at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:79-89 and runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:200-224.

Size-specific max-file rejection before embedded Neovim spawn is asserted at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:79-89 and runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:250-267.
Workspace symlink escape rejection before reads is asserted at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:64-77.

Disk mtime conflict blocking non-force saves is asserted for the shared write path at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:129-138 and for the embedded provider at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:269-300.
CRLF save without text changes preserving CRLF line endings is asserted at runtime/tests/tui/workbench/buffer-file-safety.contract.test.ts:99-112.
